Bash(python query/query.py --question "What questions did analysts ask about memory pricing?" --section qa)

Bash(python -c "
from pipeline.normalize import normalize_transcript
with open\('data/samples/aapl_q1_2026.txt'\) as f:
    raw = f.read\(\)
result = normalize_transcript\(raw, 'AAPL'\)
print\('glossary items:', len\(result['glossary']\)\)
for item in result['glossary']:
    print\(f'  [{item[\\"term\\"]}] => {item[\\"definition\\"][:60]}...'\)
")

Bash(python -c "
import os
from dotenv import load_dotenv
from pinecone import Pinecone
load_dotenv\('/Users/dhirenvazirani/earnings-intelligence/.env'\)
pc = Pinecone\(api_key=os.environ['PINECONE_API_KEY']\)
index = pc.Index\(os.environ['PINECONE_INDEX']\)
results = index.query\(
    vector=[0.0] * 1536,
    top_k=20,
    filter={'section': {'\\$eq': 'glossary'}},
    include_metadata=True
\)
print\('Glossary vectors found:', len\(results.matches\)\)
for m in results.matches:
    print\(f'  id={m.id}  section={m.metadata[\\"section\\"]}  speaker={m.metadata[\\"speaker\\"]}  role={m.metadata[\\"role\\"]}'\)
    print\(f'    text: {m.metadata[\\"text\\"][:80]}'\)
")
Bash(git rm --cached data/samples/aapl_q1_2026.txt data/samples/msft_q2_2026.txt data/samples/googl_q4_2025.txt data/samples/nvda_q4_2026.txt 2>&1)
